commit.subject: LU-9771 ptlrpc: use lu_extent in layout_intent
commit.message:
LU-9771 ptlrpc: use lu_extent in layout_intent

This way it will be easier to check and print the extent
of layout.

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-flr
